nasb.text: Therefore He again asked them, “Whom do you seek?” And they said, “Jesus the Nazarene.”

esv.text: So he asked them again, “Whom do you seek?” And they said, “Jesus of Nazareth.”

cnv.text: 他再問他們：“你們找誰？”他們說：“拿撒勒人耶穌！”

ccb.text: 耶稣又问：“你们找谁？” 他们说：“拿撒勒人耶稣。”

csbs.text: 于是耶稣又问：“你们找谁？” 他们说：“拿撒勒人耶稣。”
